repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #94483 by documenting the new public `openclaw gateway usage-cost` agent-scoping flags that the PR adds. Keep the contributor branch and code shape; make the smallest docs/API-surface alignment change before rerunning checks and review.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
What Problem This Solves

`openclaw gateway usage-cost` is gaining public `--agent <id>` and `--all-agents` flags in #94483, but the CLI docs still only show `--days` and `--json`.

Why This Change Was Made

This repair updates `docs/cli/gateway.md` on the existing #94483 branch so the new public CLI option surface is documented before merge. The code and tests from @ly-wang19 remain the source of the feature work.

User Impact

Operators can discover how to scope usage-cost output to one agent or aggregate all agents from the Gateway CLI docs.

Evidence

- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94483
- Current main docs only list usage-cost, `--days`, and `--json`.
- Run `pnpm check:changed` after the docs repair; focused CLI coverage may be rerun with `pnpm test src/cli/gateway-cli.coverage.test.ts`.
credit_notes: Repair the existing maintainer-modifiable contributor PR #94483 rather than replacing it.
Preserve credit for @ly-wang19 as the source PR author: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94483.
Release-note context belongs in the PR body/squash message; do not edit CHANGELOG.md for this normal PR repair.
